## Top 10 3-6 month opportunities
No top opportunities today.

## Catalyst-driven watchlist
### ADANIENT - Adani Enterprises
- Opportunity score: 55 (Watch closely)
- Revenue growth: 8.6% YoY, 13.0% QoQ
- Profit growth: 9630.3% YoY, 666.2% QoQ
- Setup quality: 24%
- Catalyst strength: 84%
- Valuation stretch: 69%
- Positives: Fresh catalyst support is visible
- Risks: Cash conversion is weak, Debt is high relative to profits
- Why it may work: ADANIENT combines 63% earnings momentum, 84% catalyst strength, and 24% setup quality.
- What invalidates it: Thesis weakens if momentum fades, the catalyst timeline slips, or valuation expands without matching earnings follow-through.
